requirement: Observability Mandatory — every decision must be observable
design_element: ITelemetryAggregator.ingest_event() — all state transitions published as events

requirement: Observability Mandatory — aggregated metrics must be available
design_element: AggregatedMetric, AggregationSummary, compute_metrics(), flush_window()

requirement: Observability Mandatory — alerts must be routable and suppressible
design_element: IAlertRouter with evaluate_threshold, route_alert, suppress_duplicate, acknowledge

requirement: Observability Mandatory — worker health must be observable
design_element: WorkerTopologySnapshot with status, active_leases, health_score; IDashboardDataProvider.get_worker_topology()

requirement: Observability Mandatory — failure explorer must be available
design_element: FailureExplorerResult with root_span_id, error_message, affected_spans; IDashboardDataProvider.get_failure_explorer()

requirement: Observability Mandatory — DAG visualisation must reflect execution status
design_element: DAGVisualizationNode with status, duration_ms, dependencies, error_trace; IDashboardDataProvider.get_dag_visualization()

requirement: Observability Mandatory — alert payload must include severity, source, suppression key
design_element: AlertPayload with severity, source_domain, suppression_key, routing_target, metric_value, threshold

requirement: Traceability — every span must carry trace_id and span_id
design_element: TraceSpan with trace_id, span_id, parent_id, correlation_id property

requirement: Traceability — parent_id must establish causal ordering
design_element: ITraceCollector.start_span() accepts parent_id; TraceSpan.parent_id field mandatory for non-root spans

requirement: Traceability — trace context must propagate across domains
design_element: ITraceCollector.propagate_context() returns serialisable headers for cross-domain routing; correlation rules table in 03_telemetry_aggregation_machine.md

requirement: Traceability — execution timeline must link to spans
design_element: ExecutionTimelineEvent.span_id links to TraceSpan; correlation_id property links trace_id:span_id

requirement: Traceability — every span must have correlation_id
design_element: TraceSpan.correlation_id = f"{trace_id}:{span_id}"; ExecutionTimelineEvent.correlation_id

requirement: Traceability — node state transitions link back to spans
design_element: NodeStateTransition enum captured in ExecutionTimelineEvent; all transitions carry span_id

requirement: Determinism — same trace data → same aggregation
design_element: Windowed aggregation is pure deterministic computation; AggregationSummary metrics computed by key(window_key, strategy)

requirement: Determinism — same DAG + execution → same visualisation
design_element: IDashboardDataProvider.get_dag_visualization returns deterministic result per (dag_id, execution_id)

requirement: Reversibility — ended span is immutable
design_element: ITraceCollector.end_span() marks span immutable; no mutation after end_span

requirement: Reversibility — flush failure preserves buffer
design_element: FLUSHING → BUFFERED transition on flush failure; buffer preserved for retry

requirement: Recoverability — flush failure retry with backoff
design_element: FLUSHING state has flush_retry_guard with 3 attempts and exponential backoff; FallbackBuffer on-disk spillover

requirement: Recoverability — backpressure fallback buffer
design_element: FallbackBuffer (JSONL, gzip, 10MB rotate) activates at 100% buffer; only CRITICAL + WARNING persisted

requirement: Recoverability — critical spans never dropped
design_element: Adaptive sampling algorithm preserves CRITICAL at all buffer levels; dropped_count counter monitors loss

requirement: Terminal states — persisted spans and flushed windows are terminal
design_element: PERSISTED is terminal for a window; RAW_EVENT error validation has explicit drop path

requirement: Idempotency — duplicate event ingestion merges
design_element: ITelemetryAggregator.ingest_event() merges duplicate (event_type, trace_id, span_id); flush_window() upserts

requirement: Idempotency — route_alert returns existing receipt
design_element: IAlertRouter.route_alert() returns existing AlertReceipt for duplicate alert_id

requirement: Distributed Tracing — trace_id must propagate through all subsystems
design_element: ITraceCollector.propagate_context() for cross-domain propagation; correlation rules table covers F1→D8→F3→Worker→F4

requirement: Runtime Dashboard — execution timeline queryable by execution_id
design_element: IDashboardDataProvider.get_execution_timeline() returns ExecutionTimelineSegment with nodes, duration, errors

requirement: Runtime Dashboard — DAG visualisation renderable with status overlay
design_element: DAGVisualizationResult with nodes, edges, critical_path_ms; IDashboardDataProvider.get_dag_visualization()

requirement: Runtime Dashboard — worker topology viewable
design_element: WorkerTopologyView with healthy/degraded/offline counts; WorkerTopologySnapshot with health_score and utilisation

requirement: Runtime Dashboard — failure explorer traces root cause
design_element: FailureExplorerResult with root_span_id, affected_spans, suggested_remedy; IDashboardDataProvider.get_failure_explorer()

requirement: Runtime Dashboard — alert routing with deduplication
design_element: IAlertRouter with suppress_duplicate() using suppression_key + cooldown; alert suppression matrix in 04_integration_blueprint.md
